chapter_title.en: Description of the Prayer From Its Beginning to Its End

text: 937 - عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «كُلُّ شَيْءٍ مُطْلَقٌ حَتَّى يَرِدَ فِيهِ نَهْيٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.937 - It is narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said:
"Everything is permissible unless there is a prohibition regarding it”.
